name: Checkbox
description: Binary input with indeterminate state and accessible label.

api.name: Checkbox
api.description: Binary input with indeterminate state and accessible label.

parameters.name: Checked
parameters.description: Whether the checkbox is checked. Pair with CheckedChanged for two-way binding. Ignored visually while IsIndeterminate is true.

parameters.name: CheckedChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user toggles the checkbox.

parameters.name: IsIndeterminate
parameters.description: Renders the dash ("mixed") visual instead of check/empty. Clicking clears it and checks the box. Pair with IsIndeterminateChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: IsIndeterminateChanged
parameters.description: Raised when IsIndeterminate is cleared by a user click.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables interaction and dims the checkbox.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Visible label text rendered next to the checkbox. When unset, use AriaLabel instead so the control still has an accessible name.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Optional helper text rendered under Label, wired to the control via aria-describedby.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: Explicit element id for the checkbox button. When inside a FormField, the field's generated control id takes precedence. Falls back to an auto-generated id.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name used when Label is not set (the checkbox renders without a visible label). Required for WCAG compliance when the checkbox sits alone in a cell or alongside text that isn't linked to it via for / htmlFor.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, the checkmark draws itself in via stroke-dasharray and the box plays a subtle 200ms scale bounce on check. Default is false.

parameters.name: HapticFeedback
parameters.description: When true, triggers a short haptic vibration via navigator.vibrate() each time the checkbox state changes. Silently no-ops on browsers without the Vibration API (e.g. iOS Safari). Default is false.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required: sets aria-required and renders a destructive-colored asterisk after Label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual and aria-invalid, independent of any cascaded FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the control when invalid and not composed inside a FormField (which owns its own error display).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the control when not invalid and not composed inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Field name for the hidden native bubble input, so the checkbox participates in a plain <form> POST. Falls back to the cascaded FormField's name when unset.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Value submitted for this checkbox in a native <form> POST when Name is set and the box is checked. Mirrors the native checkbox default of "on".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the checkbox button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the checkbox button element (an explicit id is ignored when inside a FormField).

events.name: CheckedChanged
events.description: Raised when the user toggles the checkbox.

events.name: IsIndeterminateChanged
events.description: Raised when IsIndeterminate is cleared by a user click.

examples.title: With Binding
examples.code:
<Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
    <Checkbox @bind-Checked="_checked" />
    <Label>Enable notifications</Label>
</Flex>
<Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Checked: @_checked</Lumeo.Text>

@code {
    private bool _checked = true;
}

mdSummary:
# Checkbox

Binary input with indeterminate state and accessible label.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/checkbox

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Checkbox | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Checked | `bool` | `false` | Whether the checkbox is checked. Pair with CheckedChanged for two-way binding. Ignored visually while IsIndeterminate is true. |
| Checkbox | CheckedChanged | `EventCallback\<bool\>` | `` | Raised when the user toggles the checkbox. |
| Checkbox | IsIndeterminate | `bool` | `false` | Renders the dash ("mixed") visual instead of check/empty. Clicking clears it and checks the box. Pair with IsIndeterminateChanged for two-way binding. |
| Checkbox | IsIndeterminateChanged | `EventCallback\<bool\>` | `` | Raised when IsIndeterminate is cleared by a user click. |
| Checkbox | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables interaction and dims the checkbox. |
| Checkbox | Label | `string?` | `` | Visible label text rendered next to the checkbox. When unset, use AriaLabel instead so the control still has an accessible name. |
| Checkbox | Description | `string?` | `` | Optional helper text rendered under Label, wired to the control via aria-describedby. |
| Checkbox | Id | `string?` | `` | Explicit element id for the checkbox button. When inside a FormField, the field's generated control id takes precedence. Falls back to an auto-generated id. |
| Checkbox | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name used when Label is not set (the checkbox renders without a visible label). Required for WCAG compliance when the checkbox sits alone in a cell or alongside text that isn't linked to it via for / htmlFor. |
| Checkbox | Animated | `bool` | `false` | When true, the checkmark draws itself in via stroke-dasharray and the box plays a subtle 200ms scale bounce on check. Default is false. |
| Checkbox | HapticFeedback | `bool` | `false` | When true, triggers a short haptic vibration via navigator.vibrate() each time the checkbox state changes. Silently no-ops on browsers without the Vibration API (e.g. iOS Safari). Default is false. |
| Checkbox | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required: sets aria-required and renders a destructive-colored asterisk after Label. |
| Checkbox | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual and aria-invalid, independent of any cascaded FormField error state. |
| Checkbox | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the control when invalid and not composed inside a FormField (which owns its own error display). |
| Checkbox | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the control when not invalid and not composed inside a FormField. |
| Checkbox | Name | `string?` | `` | Field name for the hidden native bubble input, so the checkbox participates in a plain \<form\> POST. Falls back to the cascaded FormField's name when unset. |
| Checkbox | Value | `string?` | `` | Value submitted for this checkbox in a native \<form\> POST when Name is set and the box is checked. Mirrors the native checkbox default of "on". |
| Checkbox | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the checkbox button element. |
| Checkbox | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the checkbox button element (an explicit id is ignored when inside a FormField). |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `CheckedChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Raised when the user toggles the checkbox.
- `IsIndeterminateChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Raised when IsIndeterminate is cleared by a user click.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Checkbox />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Checkbox/Checkbox.razor`
